title: OpenClaw Creator's new secret project...
summary: AI Jason announces a new project involving OpenClaw Creator, Crabbox, and a codebase harness available on GitHub. The video also promotes Superdesign and the AI Builder Club community for learning implementation details.
writeup: AI Jason announces a new project tied to the OpenClaw Creator, featuring Crabbox and a codebase harness published on GitHub. The video frames these around a test harness as a means to work with the codebase. It also promotes Superdesign and the AI Builder Club community as resources for implementation details.
